prompt: I want to index events from my YourContract smart contract using Ponder. Set up a Ponder indexer that listens for GreetingChange events and exposes them via a GraphQL API.
assertions: ponder.config.ts reads deployedContracts from SE-2 nextjs package
ponder.config.ts reads scaffoldConfig for network detection
Package named @se-2/ponder following SE-2 workspace convention
Uses Ponder virtual module imports (ponder:registry, ponder:schema, ponder:api)
Schema uses onchainTable (not older createSchema API)
Hono-based API setup for GraphQL (not old express-style)
Root package.json has ponder proxy scripts
